columns.name: id
columns.extra: NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY COMMENT 'Agent唯一ID'

columns.name: role
columns.extra: NOT NULL COMMENT '角色类型: compliance/data/knowledge/supervisor'

columns.name: toolset
columns.extra: COMMENT '可用工具列表 JSON数组'

columns.name: id
columns.extra: NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY COMMENT 'Mission唯一ID'

columns.name: mode
columns.extra: NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SUPERVISOR' COMMENT '执行模式: SUPERVISOR/PIPELINE'

columns.name: id
columns.extra: NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '子任务唯一ID'

columns.name: seq
columns.extra: NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '执行顺序(PIPELINE模式)'

columns.name: current_node_ids
columns.extra: -- JSON array of active node IDs started_at          TIMESTAMP

columns.name: candidate_users
columns.extra: -- JSON array candidate_roles JSONB,                               -- JSON array status          VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'New',          -- New/Assigned/InProgress/Completed/Rejected/Transferred priority        VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'NORMAL'

columns.name: goal_ids
columns.extra: DEFAULT '[]',        -- JSON array: ["goal-id-1", "goal-id-2"] status          VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'draft'

columns.name: goal_id
columns.extra: NOT NULL REFERENCES ecos_wm_goal(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: quota_type
columns.extra: NOT NULL,   -- API_CALLS, STORAGE_MB, etc. daily_limit     BIGINT          DEFAULT 0

columns.name: rule_type
columns.extra: NOT NULL,    -- THRESHOLD / CAUSAL / OPTIMIZATION condition_expr  TEXT         NOT NULL,    -- 规则条件表达式 action_config   JSONB,                    -- 动作配置 priority        INT          DEFAULT 0

columns.name: task_type
columns.extra: NOT NULL,       -- PIPELINE / REALTIME / AGENT / ADMIN status          VARCHAR(32)     DEFAULT 'PENDING', -- PENDING / RUNNING / SUCCESS / FAILED / CANCELLED config          JSONB,                          -- 任务配置: SQL语句、规则ID、参数等 runner          VARCHAR(64),                    -- 执行器: doris / rule / hermes priority        INT             DEFAULT 0

columns.name: clearance_level
columns.extra: DEFAULT 0,        -- 准入等级 0-4 linked_workstation   VARCHAR(256),                     -- 物理工作站绑定 audit_mode           VARCHAR(32)     DEFAULT 'basic',  -- 审计力度: basic/detailed/full sandbox_mandatory    BOOLEAN         DEFAULT FALSE,    -- 沙盒强制 is_default           BOOLEAN         DEFAULT FALSE,    -- 是否作为全局默认 created_at           TIMESTAMP       DEFAULT NOW()

columns.name: clearance_level
columns.extra: DEFAULT 0,        -- 准入等级 0-4 linked_workstation   VARCHAR(256),                     -- 物理工作站绑定 audit_mode           VARCHAR(32)     DEFAULT 'basic',  -- 审计力度: basic/detailed/full sandbox_mandatory    BOOLEAN         DEFAULT FALSE,    -- 沙盒强制 created_at           TIMESTAMP       DEFAULT NOW()

columns.name: goal_id
columns.extra: NOT NULL REFERENCES ecos_wm_goal(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: tools
columns.extra: DEFAULT '[]',   -- JSON array: ["search_knowledge", "query_object"] knowledge       TEXT DEFAULT '[]',   -- JSON array: ["kb-supplier"] status          VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'draft'

columns.name: parent_id
columns.extra: REFERENCES ecos_wm_goal(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

columns.name: source_goal_id
columns.extra: NOT NULL REFERENCES ecos_wm_goal(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: target_goal_id
columns.extra: NOT NULL REFERENCES ecos_wm_goal(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: config_json
columns.extra: DEFAULT '{}',       -- JSON: 自定义配置(score/cost/risk 等) status          VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'DRAFT'

columns.name: config_json
columns.extra: DEFAULT '{}',   -- JSON: {"threshold":95.0, "passRate":95.0} severity        VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'HIGH'

columns.name: asset_id
columns.extra: NOT NULL DEFAULT '',   -- "entity:entityId" e.g. "Customer:c005" description     TEXT DEFAULT ''

columns.name: status
columns.extra: DEFAULT 'DRAFT',   -- DRAFT / REVIEW / PUBLISHED / DEPRECATED created_by  VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT ''

columns.name: category
columns.extra: DEFAULT '',       -- 数据集 / AI模型 / API / 报表 owner       VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT ''

columns.name: rating
columns.extra: DEFAULT 0.0,      -- 评分 0.00~5.00 popularity  INTEGER      DEFAULT 0,        -- 综合热度值 status      VARCHAR(32)  DEFAULT 'PUBLISHED', -- DRAFT / PUBLISHED / DEPRECATED created_at  TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT NOW()

columns.name: status
columns.extra: DEFAULT 'PENDING',  -- PENDING / APPROVED / REJECTED created_at  TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT NOW()

columns.name: scenario
columns.extra: -- 情景描述 tags        TEXT[],                  -- 标签数组 decision    JSONB        DEFAULT '{}', -- 决策内容 result      JSONB        DEFAULT '{}', -- 执行结果 feedback    VARCHAR(32)  DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending/positive/negative source      VARCHAR(64),             -- 来源: causal/agent/manual created_by  VARCHAR(128)

columns.name: current_node_ids
columns.extra: -- JSON array of active node IDs started_at          TIMESTAMP

columns.name: candidate_users
columns.extra: -- JSON array candidate_roles JSONB,                               -- JSON array status          VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'New',          -- New/Assigned/InProgress/Completed/Rejected/Transferred priority        VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'NORMAL'

columns.name: goal_ids
columns.extra: DEFAULT '[]',        -- JSON array: ["goal-id-1", "goal-id-2"] status          VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'draft'

columns.name: tools
columns.extra: DEFAULT '[]',   -- JSON array: ["search_knowledge", "query_object"] knowledge       TEXT DEFAULT '[]',   -- JSON array: ["kb-supplier"] status          VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'draft'

columns.name: parent_id
columns.extra: REFERENCES ecos_wm_goal(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

columns.name: source_goal_id
columns.extra: NOT NULL REFERENCES ecos_wm_goal(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: target_goal_id
columns.extra: NOT NULL REFERENCES ecos_wm_goal(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

columns.name: config_json
columns.extra: DEFAULT '{}',       -- JSON: 自定义配置(score/cost/risk 等) status          VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'DRAFT'

columns.name: config_json
columns.extra: DEFAULT '{}',   -- JSON: {"threshold":95.0, "passRate":95.0} severity        VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'HIGH'

columns.name: asset_id
columns.extra: NOT NULL DEFAULT '',   -- "entity:entityId" e.g. "Customer:c005" description     TEXT DEFAULT ''

columns.name: status
columns.extra: DEFAULT 'DRAFT',   -- DRAFT / REVIEW / PUBLISHED / DEPRECATED created_by  VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT ''

columns.name: category
columns.extra: DEFAULT '',       -- 数据集 / AI模型 / API / 报表 owner       VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT ''

columns.name: rating
columns.extra: DEFAULT 0.0,      -- 评分 0.00~5.00 popularity  INTEGER      DEFAULT 0,        -- 综合热度值 status      VARCHAR(32)  DEFAULT 'PUBLISHED', -- DRAFT / PUBLISHED / DEPRECATED created_at  TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT NOW()

columns.name: status
columns.extra: DEFAULT 'PENDING',  -- PENDING / APPROVED / REJECTED created_at  TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT NOW()
